title: feat: port parallel runner feature from upstream SignalPilot
description:
## Summary
- Ported parallel runner feature: RunManager spawns isolated sibling Docker worker containers (up to 10 concurrent), each running the full Buddy agent with its own git repo volume
- Added Worker DB model, 12 parallel API endpoints on agent server, dashboard backend proxy endpoints, and full frontend with useParallelRuns hook, ParallelRunsView/ParallelRunsPanel/SlotCard components
- Mobile-responsive layout with useMobile hook, MobileTab bar, MobileControlSheet drawer, and touch-friendly CSS
- Worker-side HTTP endpoints (/start, /stop, /pause, /resume_signal, /inject, /unlock, /kill) preserved on agent server for RunManager to control each worker container
- Ported Cloudflare tunnel manager UI: TunnelPopover component, useTunnel hook, tunnel API functions, and /api/tunnel/* backend endpoints using docker SDK
- Removed legacy single-runner proxy layer from dashboard backend; parallel runner is now the only code path

## Tests
- All 72 existing Python tests pass
- TypeScript compiles with no errors
- Worker containers receive /start and return run_id
- stop/pause/resume/inject/unlock/kill signals reach workers via RunManager
- TunnelPopover shows in header; start/stop tunnel controls work
